name: openfda_drug_search
description: Search OpenFDA drug label database for brand or generic drugs. Returns structured information including brand name, manufacturer, product type, indications, and adverse reactions.

drug_name.description: Name of the drug to search for. Can be brand name (e.g., 'Tylenol', 'Advil', 'Lipitor') or generic name (e.g., 'acetaminophen', 'ibuprofen', 'atorvastatin'). Use specific drug names rather than drug classes.

max_results.description: Maximum number of results to return (default 10, max 50)
